commands.review_summary:
The branch exports the disabled-Codex-plugin route detector, registers a `core/doctor/codex-session-routes` lint health check, and adds focused doctor lint/core tests.

PR surface: Source +50, Tests +89. Total +139 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main has the disabled-Codex-plugin route detector but does not register the matching doctor-lint health check, so `doctor --lint` cannot report this structured id. I did not run the CLI because this review is read-only.

target.title: [codex] Surface disabled Codex plugin routes in doctor lint
target.body:
Closes #88751.

## Summary
- Adds a structured `core/doctor/codex-session-routes` health check so `openclaw doctor --lint` reports OpenAI/Codex-runtime routes when the Codex plugin is disabled.
- Reuses the existing disabled-Codex-plugin route detector and keeps the repair path in the existing `doctor --fix` route repair flow.
- Adds focused CLI/core tests proving lint now returns a warning instead of reporting a clean run for this config mismatch.

## Verification
- `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --store-dir C:\oc-work\.pnpm-store`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/commands/doctor-lint.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/codex-route-warnings.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor-lint.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/codex-route-warnings.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts`

## Real Behavior Proof
- Behavior addressed: `doctor --lint` missed configs where agent routes resolve to the Codex runtime while `plugins.entries.codex.enabled` is false, leaving cron/session runs to fail later with `MissingAgentHarnessError`.
- Real environment tested: local Windows desktop worktree `C:\oc-work\oc-88751`, rebased on `origin/main` at `7aa309319f`.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: the focused Vitest command above exercises `runDoctorLintCli` with a disabled Codex plugin plus `gpt-5.5` Codex-runtime route, and the core health-check detector directly.
- Evidence after fix: `src/commands/doctor-lint.test.ts` now observes `core/doctor/codex-session-routes`, warning severity, path `agents.defaults.model.primary`, target `openai/gpt-5.5`, and non-zero lint exit; `src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts` verifies the registered core health finding.
- Observed result after fix: focused suite passed post-rebase: 15 doctor-lint tests, 110 combined Codex-route/core-check tests, 2 Vitest shards passed.
- What was not tested: live VPS config mutation from this PR. The issue has live beta failure evidence, and this patch only changes lint detection; the existing `doctor --fix` repair path was intentionally left in place.
target.author: brokemac79
